name: chromium
description: Chromium is a trace mineral added to fortify foods and support metabolic functions, particularly glucose regulation.
raw_text: Tropicana slim: Sorbitol, Erythritol, Sucralose (ADI: 15 mg/kg body weight/day), Acesulfame-K (ADI: 15 mg/kg body weight/day), Corn Powder and Chromium Picolinate. | Labels: en:with-chromium | Labels: en:vegetarian, en:vegan
